series_metadata.series_description: Dealers in Motor Fuel that purchase fuel in Ohio and export all of the fuel outside the state, file this form to show detail of their sales (disbursements).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years after end of calendar year in which report was filed, then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years after end of calendar year in which report was filed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
